stemHtml: How is the design manoeuvring speed (V<sub>A</sub>) affected by changes in aircraft mass (weight)?

options.a: A decrease in aircraft mass results in an increase in VA.
options.b: A decrease in aircraft mass results in a decrease in V<sub>A</sub>.
options.c: Aircraft mass has no effect on V<sub>A</sub>.
options.d: An increase in aircraft mass results in a decrease in VA.
